hook.summary: A relaxing showcase of a Sinistea card on a smartphone screen with soft purple text overlays.
hook.visual_action: The camera focuses on a smartphone displaying a Pokémon card while calm text animations appear.
hook.text_overlay: ポケポケで ホッと 一息つきませんか？
hook.voiceover_transcript: ポケポケで、ホッと一息つきませんか？

scene_flow: Introduction of the game with a focus on a single Pokémon card (Sinistea) to set a calm mood.
Transition to showing multiple cards like Indeedee to emphasize collection variety.
A collage of various Pokémon cards highlighting the 'healing' and relaxing theme of the game.
Final screen with app store links and a call to download alongside promotional login rewards.
on_screen_text: 「30日プレゼント」ミッション開催中！
スキマ時間にスマホで、
ポケモンに囲まれる癒しのひと時
毎日のログインで特別な報酬や最大30パック分のパック砂時計を手に入れよう！
今すぐログインで ×10パック分ゲット！
毎日2パック無料で開封
audience_proxy: Casual Pokémon fans and mobile gamers looking for a relaxing, low-stress collection experience.
